title: International Agreements - Canada.ca
content:
## International Agreements
This section contains bilateral agreements between Canada and other countries that guide cooperative activities relating to health. This list only includes agreements signed from 2000 on that are still in force. These agreements include memoranda of understanding, plans of action and letters/declarations of intent.
About International Agreements
- Joint Statement of Intent regarding Cooperation in the Field of Risk Assessment and Management of Existing Industrial Chemicals Entry into Force: 24-Aug-07 Termination: Indefinite
- Entry into Force: 24-Aug-07
- Termination: Indefinite
- Joint Letter of Intent regarding Cooperation in the Field of Health for the Period 2007-2011 Entry into Force: 06-Jun-07 Termination: 31-Dec-11
- Entry into Force: 06-Jun-07
- Termination: 31-Dec-11
- MOU on the Subject of Quality Management System Certification for Medical Devices Entry into Force: 01-Jun-07 Termination: At the commencement of the Therapeutic Products Act 2007 (Australia - New-Zealand)
- Entry into Force: 01-Jun-07
- Termination: At the commencement of the Therapeutic Products Act 2007 (Australia - New-Zealand)
- Cooperative Arrangement on the Subject of Sharing Information on New Industrial Chemicals Entry into Force: 15-may-07 Termination: 15-may-12
- Entry into Force: 15-may-07
- Termination: 15-may-12
- MOU regarding Therapeutic Products Entry into Force: 14-Apr-04 Termination: Indefinite
- Entry into Force: 14-Apr-04
- Termination: Indefinite
- Memorandum of Understanding between the Department of Health of Canada and the Ministry of Health of the Federative Republic of Brazil on Health Sector Collaboration * Agreement in Portuguese available upon request

- Entry into Force: October 2011
- Termination: 31-Dec-2014
